title: Pastel Blue Balloons - 12 Inch, 100 Pack Light Blue Latex Balloons for Gender Reveal, Baby Shower, Birthday, Wedding Parties
features: 🎈 Round Balloons Set Includes - Each balloon kit contains 100pcs pastel blue 12 inch balloons for balloon arch kit balloon garland decorations and 1pc light blue balloon ribbon (total of 33 feet). The right quantity of party balloons and the most suitable color allow you to create a visually striking and captivating atmosphere that will leave your guests in awe.

✨ Blue Party Decor - Globos azul cielol can be used in baby blue themed party backdrop for men women girls boys or mix with any color to create a blue pastel balloons wedding, graduation party, birthday party, gender reveal,boho party, baby shower, bridal shower, anniversary, engagement, Halloween, Christmas, New Year and any themed party inside or outside, which makes your party more special.

🎈 High Quality Balloon Decoration - Our light blue 12 inch party balloons are made from premium latex materials, non-toxic, ensuring exceptional quality and durability, not easy to burst. They are much more durable than regular soft blue matte helium balloons and after expansion, the macaron blue balloons can stay in good shape for a long time, so you don't have to worry about them bursting before the party is over.

✨ What To Fill With - Our blue birthday balloons for arch garland, pastel blue party decorations are high quality natural latex with good elasticity, supported with air or helium. The 12in blue balloon set also includes a ribbon, you can easily make a balloon bouquet, let your little ones run happily with it or let your family or friends take beautiful photos with pastel blue and pink balloons arch kit baby boy girl.

✨ After Sales Service - To achieve the floating effect, helium gas is required. Please Do not over-fill the balloons and avoid sunburn, overheating and sharp objects. You can pull the balloon tail tightly to let it last longer after the balloon is knotted. Please remember to always supervise children when playing balloons, as they can present a choking hazard if not handled properly. ​If you have any questions, please contact us!
